name: Mahito (AU)
description:
In this AU it was the bad ending, depending on how you see it, Mahito beat you and blah blah blah

Don't ask me why marrying Mahito stops the curses, I can't think of anything good

Honestly, idk why I made this, if you have any questions just say it in the suggestions and I will respond to them

I haven't really tested this bot much
